category_sources: Official GitHub README says Gpredict is a real-time satellite tracking and orbit prediction program.
source_facts.description says Gpredict is a real-time satellite tracking/prediction application.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use the name Gpredict.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes usage and build guidance.
Official Gpredict Documents page links the user manual and technical notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/csete/gpredict; per instruction, repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README mentions SGP4/SDP4, NORAD TLE data, Doppler tuning, Hamlib, and Gtk+ 3.
source_facts.description identifies tracking and prediction purpose.
